RadixCache
infer/src/prefix_cache.rs
tier-aware metadata:
hit_count · tier_location · session_id
fingerprint · soft_pin_until · byte_len
API: lookup_or_stage

ReadmissionPlan
+ WaitingFetch + promote_fetched_prefix
staged 回升路径
(demote → 命中 → 重 attach GPU)

✅ T0 GPU paged KV
crates/cuda-kernels/src/paged_kv.rs
BF16 · page_size=16 · page-aware
decode-time COW · GPU 直接 prefix attach

text.text:
✅ T1 Host pinned
infer/src/kv_tier/host_pool.rs
HostPinnedPool (kv-native-sys arena)
demotion 落点

✅ T2 NVMe (node-local)
infer/src/kv_tier/transport/disk.rs
file/block ABI · WAL · mmap · shm
(via crates/kv-native-sys)

✅ T3 Shared FS (cluster)
kv_tier/transport/shared_fs.rs
minimal cluster-shared backend

🚧 T3 NIXL Remote
RDMA-style cross-node transport
stub-only — 尚未拉通

状态: 本地路径 (T0–T2 + T3 shared_fs) 已拉通 ✅
跨节点 NIXL 仍为 stub-only 🚧 (blocker for 多机 KV 共享)
